commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: Simon answered and said, I suppose that he to whom he forgave most. And He said unto him, Thou hast rightly judged. Christ praises the answer, in order that Simon might the more readily accept the reproof and the lessons to be drawn therefrom.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: In proportion to our sins, should be our grief, says St. Cyprian: ut poenitentia non sit minor crimine. (lib. de lapsis.)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
